title: Resolve curvature-accounting condition: C4: e_curv A-tail danger
description: Sector: e_curv source-reservoir route. Allowed condition: q_e = 0 unless a future source law derives e_curv routing and no double counting. Forbidden condition: e_curv induces delta_A = q_e/r and shifts M_A by source-reservoir logic. Consequence: e_curv cannot become a second exterior A-tail source..
